Interface IBaseNetwork

Namespace
ESRI.ArcGIS.Geodatabase
Assembly
ESRI.Server.Geodatabase.dll

Provides access to members that specify the properties of a base network.

[Guid("C34C6EE5-A130-48E7-8B1A-11D20BAB23D9")]
[InterfaceType(ComInterfaceType.InterfaceIsIUnknown)]
public interface IBaseNetwork

Returns the associations table.
